title: Palli Kondeswarar Temple, Surutupalle
tagline: Palli Kondeswarar Temple, Surutupalle — spiritual town of Andhra Pradesh

heroImage.alt: Palli Kondeswarar Temple, Surutupalle, Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Pallikondeswara Temple(also Pradosha kshetram) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Shiva located in Surutupalle, a village in Tirupati district of Andhra Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Pallikondeswara Temple(also Pradosha kshetram) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Shiva located in Surutupalle, a village in Tirupati district of Andhra Pradesh, India. The presiding deity Pallikondeswara, unlike other Shiva temples, is sported in reclining posture lying on the lap of his consort Parvati. The temple house a three-tiered gateway tower known as gopurams. The temple has numerous shrines, with those of Valmeegeeswarar and Maragathambigai being the most prominent.

topPlaces.name: Kaladipet metro station
topPlaces.description: Kaladipet (formerly known as Thangal Metro station) is an elevated metro station on the North-South Corridor of the Line 1 Extension of the Blue Line of Chennai Metro in Chennai, India. This station will serve the neighbourhoods of Kaladipet and other northern suburbs of Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Kalyana Varadharaja Perumal Temple (Thiruvottiyur)
topPlaces.description: Varadharaja Perumal temple is a Vishnu temple located at Kaladipet in Thiruvottiyur. This temple is located near Thyagaraja Swamy temple, Thiruvottiyur.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Palli Kondeswarar Temple, Surutupalle?
faq.a: The best time to visit Palli Kondeswarar Temple, Surutupalle is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Palli Kondeswarar Temple, Surutupalle?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (22 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (8 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Palli Kondeswarar Temple, Surutupalle?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Palli Kondeswarar Temple, Surutupalle at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Palli Kondeswarar Temple, Surutupalle?
faq.a: Stays in Palli Kondeswarar Temple, Surutupalle start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Palli Kondeswarar Temple, Surutupalle?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kaladipet metro station, Kalyana Varadharaja Perumal Temple (Thiruvottiyur), Tollgate metro station, Tiruvottriyur Theradi metro station, Tiruvottiyur.
